This item is found by foraging.
This item is a ground spawn.

# Apr 12 2018 at 1:39 PM Rating: Good
Kajolus
Sage
1,252 posts
As BuenaChica1 says here: https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=14636

Quote:
If you want this stuff go to Lesser fay, it's all over the ground in the Fairy camp and a good bit around the Brownies too. 30 pick ups netted me 18 of these, 10 Jack-O-Lantern and 2 Blue Slumber. All good for dyes.


Sound advice :-)

The Fairy camp is in the NW of the zone. loc: 1070, 3600, 0

____________________________
Still a noob. :-P

I thought they only spawned around the raised gazebo area, actually I fount them all over outside the house and north of the hedge. even on the little hill with serra and the gnome splunker inside

# Jun 25 2007 at 3:04 PM Rating: Decent
Sukrasisx
Scholar
463 posts
I found several of these as ground spawn (look like red-topped mushrooms) in the Gazebo and around the tree in front of the Gazebo. Never saw a repop in exactly the same place, but kept finding new ones popping in those areas (usually after running around a while and failing to find any other spawn points).
